options.name: coinsanity
options.description:
Whether collecting coins are checks
If none, you will collect your own coins

options.name: campaign
options.description: Which campaign you want to play

options.name: item_shuffle
options.description: Should Inventory Items be separate from their DLCs and shuffled in the item pool

options.name: coinbundlequantity
options.description:
This is the amount of coins in a coin bundle
You need to collect that number of coins to get a location check, and when receiving coin items, you will get bundles of this size
It is highly recommended to not set this value below 10, as it generates a very large number of boring locations and items.
In the worst case, it is 1500+ checks for a single coin

options.name: permanent_coins
options.description: If purchasing a pack decreases your current coins amounts.

options.name: ending_choice
options.description: Which ending is considered completion for the DLC Quest campaign, either any ending or the true ending

options.name: double_jump_glitch
options.description: Whether to include the double jump glitches in logic. Separated between the simple ones and the very difficult ones

options.name: time_is_money
options.description:
Whether the Time is Money pack is considered required to complete the grindstone.
If optional, you may be expected to grind 10 000 times by hand

options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.
options: Live Freemium or Die: Coin Bundle
Live Freemium or Die: Progressive Weapon
Live Freemium or Die: Coin Piece

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.
options: Live Freemium or Die: Coin Bundle
Live Freemium or Die: Progressive Weapon
Live Freemium or Die: Coin Piece

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"
options: Live Freemium or Die: Coin Bundle
Live Freemium or Die: Progressive Weapon
Live Freemium or Die: Coin Piece

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
options: Live Freemium or Die: Coin Bundle
Live Freemium or Die: Progressive Weapon
Live Freemium or Die: Coin Piece
